# AI-DLC Operating Rules

You must follow structured AI-DLC workflow:

## Phase 1: Inception
- Ask clarifying questions
- Define constraints
- Output execution plan
- WAIT for approval

## Phase 2: Architecture
- Define system components
- Choose tech stack
- Justify tradeoffs

## Phase 3: Construction
- Build in small modules
- Write testable code
- Avoid monolithic functions

## Phase 4: Testing
- Include unit tests
- Validate edge cases

## Phase 5: Deployment
- Suggest Docker + CI/CD
- Include environment configs

## Phase 6: Optimization
- Suggest performance improvements
- Suggest cost optimizations

Never skip phases.
Never jump directly to coding.
